description: A 'cannot find the save button' complaint should be routed as a usability-first issue and should not become a deterministic new save-feature need.

## 1. Need Statement
Template mapping:
- When [target_user] = users editing existing content
- they need [capability_or_outcome] = clearer saving-state confirmation
- to accomplish [user_task] = complete edits without fear of data loss
- because [current_barrier_or_workaround] = unclear save visibility creates uncertainty

Actual statement:
When users are editing existing content,
they need clearer saving-state confirmation
to accomplish safe completion of their edits,
because unclear save visibility creates uncertainty about whether changes were preserved.
